{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/30854794?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/YLChen-007/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/YLChen-007/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/YLChen-007/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/YLChen-007/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/YLChen-007", "id": 30854794, "login": "YLChen-007", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjMwODU0Nzk0", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/YLChen-007/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/YLChen-007/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/YLChen-007/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/YLChen-007/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/YLChen-007/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/YLChen-007", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-53840", "cvss": {"score": 7.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-200", "name": "Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor"}], "description": "### Summary

OpenClaw supports remote MCP Streamable HTTP servers with operator-configured custom headers. In affected releases, those headers could be forwarded when the MCP endpoint responded with a cross-origin redirect.

This issue is limited to configured MCP Streamable HTTP servers that use custom headers. It does not expose unrelated OpenClaw credentials.

### Affected configurations

This affects deployments where an MCP server is configured with:

- `transportType: "streamable-http"`
- sensitive custom headers under `mcp.servers.*.headers`
- an MCP endpoint that is malicious, compromised, or able to redirect to another origin

### Impact

Custom MCP headers, such as API keys or tenant-routing headers, could be sent to the redirect target. The exposed credential scope depends on the header the operator configured for that MCP server.

### Patched Versions

The first stable patched version is `2026.5.12`.

### Mitigations

Upgrade to `openclaw@2026.5.8` or later. Before upgrading, avoid custom MCP headers with servers you do not fully trust, and rotate any MCP-specific credentials that may have been exposed by a redirecting endpoint.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00223, "percentile": 0.12711}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-rjxq-qqhf-8hwh", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-17T17:55:06Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-rjxq-qqhf-8hwh", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-rjxq-qqhf-8hwh"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-53840"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-17T17:55:06Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-rjxq-qqhf-8hwh", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-53840", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/openclaw-custom-header-leakage-via-mcp-streamable-http-cross-origin-redirects", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-rjxq-qqhf-8hwh"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/security-advisories/GHSA-rjxq-qqhf-8hwh", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw", "summary": "OpenClaw: MCP Streamable HTTP redirects could forward configured custom headers to another origin", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-17T17:55:08Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-rjxq-qqhf-8hwh", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.5.12", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2026.5.12"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: OpenClaw: MCP Streamable HTTP redirects could forward configured custom headers to another origin
